title: Chapter 66
content:
Before anyone, or a certain someone, asks in the comments, the reason the MC never tried creating something from his original world was that he never needed to. The reason is stated in the chapter, so please don't criticize that.

Thank you.

Enjoy~~

~~

Chapter 66

In the world of martial arts, there was a woman from the Yin sect. She was born with a rare bloodline. Or perhaps it was a physique? I was never able to differentiate between the two. What I did know was that her growth potential was unlimited. Well, near unlimited.

She reached the transcendent realm in almost seven months. That was a significant achievement considering others took around sixty to seventy years to reach that realm, and even then, the requirement of them being talented was needed in droves.

So, compared to that, seven months was an unimaginable time. The Yin sect made a name for themselves thanks to her, settling themselves as one of the nine sects, but the story came to an end when the woman died even before she turned twenty-five.

The extreme Yin energy froze the mountains around her, and even with her suppressing it, it was useless.

Another example from the same world was a guy born with an extreme yang body. While his fate wasn't as drastic as hers, he could never have children, which was a punishment quite dim compared to the woman's, but his growth process wasn't as quick as hers either.

Then in the world of the magic where a saintess was born, but she couldn't marry; otherwise, her powers would be cut in half.

Another boy born with the best demonic physique, but he gave in to the massive insanity of darkness and destroyed half of the demon realm.

And then on and on and on. The bottom line was that such special characteristics were always bestowed with weaknesses to counter the advantage.

In my case, the advantage of the system was countered by the fact that I couldn't grow like others, only through the system.

Now, what would happen if a bloodline unknown to me was thrown into the mix? The punishment written yet was death in five years, but that wasn't what I was worried about.

I felt it before as well, and now that it was practically pointed out to me, I realized that the bloodline I had was related to lust.

I wasn't this much lascivious, you know. Sure, discovering the world of free use was thrilling, but it didn't mean I would let it cloud my judgment. And I hadn't done that so far either, but so far, the scale had been quite low.

But, what if it wasn't?

What if it was just the beginner phase, and true hardships were to come?

In that case, all I could do was control myself. I wasn't one to give in to lust so easily, but still, perhaps it would be better to prepare in advance.

Now comes the part of whether or not I focus on unlocking the bloodline. Well, that was a no-brainer because there was no way in hell I was dying so soon. I had a life before me, and a life of my favorite genre at that. I wasn't willing to die even if my time was up.

Anyway, if I were going to live for a long time, and so actively anyway, then perhaps it was time to put the experiences of my past lives to develop this world better.

Oh, did I not mention it before?

I was a mechanical engineer in my first life, the real one, on planet Earth. Of course, it was the life of a lonely nerd who was berated almost all of his life, bullied, and pushed to the extremes, but if I was proud of one thing, it was my knowledge.

I was not only an expert in my field, but I was also proficient in other fields.

As for the question of how to awaken my bloodline, there was nothing to worry about. Given the content and the upgrades, I had a very good idea what it was.

To answer that question, I needed information from someone else.

There was still about an hour before noon when Zara's voice rang from her room, "Is anyone there?!!!"

The soldiers outside the room looked at each other, but I moved first and said, "I'll tend to her."

One of the soldiers nodded, and the other one ran somewhere in a hurry. My guess was to get Zara's daughter. I guess she must have told them to call her in such a situation.

"I'm here, Lady Zara," I said as I entered the room.

"Oh, good. You're here." Zara said, her expression a little tense but nothing too threatening.

"I feel itchy for some reason. It has never happened before, so can you check it? Call for a physician if needed." Zara said.

"There is no need, Lady Zara. I'm an expert in the vaginal field." I replied with pride brimming in my voice and knelt between her knees. As expected, she was wet, and her pussy was practically gushing.

Sex wasn't an option or usually advised during a period because it could cause injuries or infection, even when it wasn't strictly off the books. But holding back was always better than the risk of an internal injury.

Besides, it wasn't like there wasn't another option.

"Could you turn on your stomach, Lady Zara?" I asked.

"Yes." Zara immediately replied and turned on all fours, even though I hadn't taught her that. She looked back by turning her head and asked, "Can you see everything?"

"Yes, Lady Zara," I replied.

I dived in without further ado.

[Cleanse]

Applying a cleanse to her asshole, I gave it a gentle probe instead of a lick.

"Wh-what are you doing?! It's dirty there! Not to mention that's not where it itches." Zara protested but more like protested with her lower mouth as it gushed even more, as if asking me to come to the right place.

"Trust me, Lady Zara. You will feel much better this way." I replied.

Now I didn't want to do this, but let's just call it practice. Zara was a good test subject, after all.

[Creation (B)]

I conjured mana and a piece of silver purchased from the shop and combined them to create a somethin' somethin'.

Being a loner in my first life, toys were something I had to use to satisfy myself. That led me to buy women's toys as well because the hookers I rented weren't against such things.

So with a vivid imagination, I created something I remembered from that time.

And finally...

[Creation successful]

[Identifying item and grading...]

[Item identified and graded successfully]

[Type: Item]

[Rank: D]

[Description: An item created from the user's imagination to deliver pleasure to women and train them for some forbidden fun]

[Effect: Upon equipping by a woman, the wearer would feel constant vibration according to their desired intensity]

[Fuel required: Mana crystal]

[Auto cleanse has been cast on the item]

[Proficiency of 'Creation' has increased by 10% for making an item that never existed in this world]

The last reward was unexpected, but then again, I never had to make butt plugs in any of my last lives. Or any other item for that matter, because I was always so desperate to survive.

Besides, no woman was willing to do so anyway. I mean, I had anal sex, sure, but degrading plays were out of question because quite a few women were prideful about their bodies, so they never allowed such a thing.

Anyway...

A slight vibration entered my ears. It was slight, so low that unless one really focused, they wouldn't be able to pick it up.

But that was just the assurance that the item was working properly and...
